Details.Agency: 2ª VARA DE FAMILIA E SUCESSOES DA COMARCA DE SOBRAL
Details.PenaltyTime: 60 (contados a partir da data da prisão)

NormalizedDetails.Agency: 2ª VARA DE FAMILIA E SUCESSOES DA COMARCA DE SOBRAL
NormalizedDetails.PenaltyTime: 60 (contados a partir da data da prisão)

Details.Decision:
Em face do exposto, decreto a custódia civil de FRANCISCO TACIANO DE SOUSA em conformidade com o art. 5º, inc. LXVII da Constituição Federal e art. 528, § 3º, do CPC, pelo prazo de 60 (sessenta) dias, ou até que seja pago o valor devido, no qual devem ser incluídas as parcelas que se vencerem até o dia do pagamento, como constou expressamente do mandado de intimação. Expeça-se o mandado de prisão a ser cumprida no regime fechado (prazo de dois anos) e consigne-se nele o valor atualizado da dívida (fls. 91/92), ressalvando-se que o inadimplemento das verbas devidas a título de custas e honorários não sujeita a prisão. Inclua-se no BNMP 2.0. DETERMINO QUE O MANDADO DE PRISÃO CIVIL SEJA ENCAMINHADO PARA A CEMAN PARA FINS DE CUMPRIMENTO. Ciência ao MPE e à DPE. Intime-se. Cumpra-se.
Sobral/CE, 29 de novembro de 2024.
Details.Agency: 2ª VARA DE FAMILIA E SUCESSOES DA COMARCA DE SOBRAL

Details.charges: agresion sexual en menor o incapaz

Details.reward: the fbi is offering a reward of up to $25,000 for information leading directly to the arrest of francisco martinez.
Details.remarks: martinez is balding and usually wears baseball caps. he has permanent resident status in the united states. martinez has ties to ecuador, new york, new jersey, pennsylvania, and florida. he may be traveling throughout south america.
Details.caution: francisco martinez is wanted for allegedly shooting to death his employer in passaic, new jersey, on september 14, 2001. the victim was shot execution-style in the basement of the building in which they both worked. the two men had allegedly been arguing that day after the victim confronted martinez about his possible involvement in both a fire which was set at the business in august of 2001, as well as the ongoing theft of textile materials from the business. local arrest warrants charging martinez with murder, possession of a weapon for an unlawful purpose, and unlawful possession of a weapon were issued in the passaic county superior court on september 21, 2001. a federal arrest warrant charging martinez with unlawful flight to avoid prosecution was then issued on july 25, 2002, in newark, new jersey.
Details.description: unlawful flight to avoid prosecution - murder, possession of a weapon for an unlawful purpose, unlawful possession of a weapon
Details.considerations: should be considered armed and dangerous
Details.occupation: warehouse worker, textile worker, production manager
Details.scars_and_marks: martinez has a discoloration on the portion of his head which is bald.

Details.distinguishing_marks: martinez may weigh between 77 and 159 kilograms, his black or brown hair is balding, the skin on his head may be discolored, and he may wear a hat to conceal the discolored skin.
Details.charges: 1) murder in the first degree 2) possession of a weapon for an unlawful purpose in the second degree 3) unlawful possession of a weapon in the third degree 4) aggravated arson in the second degree 5) theft in the third degree

Details.caution: francisco fabian torres gaona is wanted for his alleged involvement in a scheme to smuggle fentanyl, methamphetamine and heroin from mexico into the united states – narcotics that allegedly were packed into fire extinguishers and concealed in scrap metal loads.
Details.description: conspiracy to import controlled substances and to distribute controlled substances for the purpose of unlawful importation; conspiracy to distribute and to possess with intent to distribute controlled substances; possession with intent to distribute controlled substances

Details.SanctionAliases|MatchRate: FRANCISCO JUVERA MOLINA-NEAVE|53;FRANCISCO MOLINA|58;FRANCISCO JAVIER MOLINA|55;CHRISTIAN MORALES-SANTIBANES|25;FRANCISCO NEAVE|58;CHRISTIAN SANTIBANEZ|13;FRANCISCO MORALES|57
Details.remarks: molina-neave, who was born in mexico, has told people he was born in el paso, texas, where he attended elementary and junior high schools. the fugitive has ties to colorado, texas, california, and mexico.
Details.caution: francisco molina-neave is being sought for assault and the prohibited use of a weapon. reports in this case allege the following: on july 5, 1997, francisco molina-neave and his girlfriend attended a holiday party in the denver metro area. while driving home from the party, molina-neave, who was seated in the front passenger seat, began punching his girlfriend as she was driving. she stopped the car and pulled over. molina-neave got out and walked around to the driver’s side of the car where he continued to beat his girlfriend.
Details.description: unlawful flight to avoid prosecution - first degree assault, attempted first degree assault, prohibited use of a weapon, and third degree assault
Details.considerations: should be considered dangerous and an escape risk
Details.scars_and_marks: molina-neave has three freckles or moles in a cresent shape on his right cheek under his right eye.

Details.ukstatementofreasons: as deputy director general of the nicaraguan national police (nnp) francisco diaz was de facto leader of the police forces during the wave of violence that began in nicaragua in april 2018. diaz was appointed director general of the nnp in august 2018. in these two roles, he was responsible for orchestrating the repressive actions, violence, and acts of torture by the police and pro-government armed gangs against protesters, students and civil society members. there are therefore reasonable grounds to suspect that he has been involved in serious human rights violations in nicaragua.
Details.otherinformation: the director disqualification sanction was imposed on 09/04/2025.
Details.position_1: director general of the nicaraguan national police (nnp)

PROFERIDO DESPACHO DE MERO EXPEDIENTE | AVOQUEI OS AUTOS, EM INSPECAO PERMANENTE, TENDO EM VISTA SE ENCONTRAREM NA RELACAO DO SISTEMA DE ESTATISTICAS E INFORMACAO (SEI) DE PROCESSOS PARADOS HA MAIS DE 100 (CEM) DIAS. CUMPRAM-SE AS ORDENS CONTIDAS NA DECISAO DE FLS. 56/58, DEVOLVENDO O PRESENTE PROCESSO AO JUIZADO ESPECIAL CRIMINAL DESTA COMARCA.

RECEBIDA A DENUNCIA | POR TAIS RAZOES, CHAMO O FEITO A ORDEM PARA ANULAR A DECISAO DE FLS. 48/49, ASSIM COMO OS ATOS PROCESSUAIS SUBSEQUENTES, DEVOLVENDO O PROCESSO AO JUIZADO ESPECIAL CRIMINAL DA COMARCA DE SOBRAL PARA QUE ALI TENHA O SEU REGULAR PROCESSAMENTO. INTIMEM-SE O MINISTERIO PUBLICO E DEFENSORIA PUBLICA. EXPEDIENTES NECESSARIOS.
